[http://www.lolclass.com/ LoL Class] |created= 2016-11-30 |disbanded= 2016-12-16 |trades= |rosterphoto= }}{{TOCRWI|2}} '''Origen Academy''' was a European team. == History == '''Origen Academy''' was built by the organization [[Origen]] in December 2016 to attempt to qualify for the 2017 EU Challenger Series. They participated in the [[EU Challenger Series/2017 Season/Spring Qualifiers/Open Qualifier|Open Qualifier]]. After a bye in the first round, a win by default against [[Baskonia eSports]] and a 0-2 against MCon Logitech G, Origen Academy was knocked out of the qualifier after losing 2-0 against [[Fnatic Academy]]. The team disbanded one day later. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} ==Organization== {{AcademyStaffNotice|Origen}} ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayer|xPeke|es|Enrique Cedeño Martínez|'''Founder & Owner'''|newteam=Origen}} {{listplayersp|jzafra|es|Javier Zafra de Jáudenes|'''Chief Executive Officer'''|newteam=Origen}} {{listplayersp|Fr33stylez|nl|Silvano Allemekinders|'''Community Manager'''|newteam=Origen}} {{listplayersp|Skadi|es|Sara Abelló|'''Graphic Designer'''|newteam=Origen}} {{listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Media == {{TeamMedia}} == Images == == External Links == == References ==
